ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: Exalt the name of your Lord, the Most High,
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: Glorify the Name of your Lord, the Most High,
and Who ordained precisely and inspired accordingly,

ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: And who brings out the pasture

ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: then reduces it to withered chaff.

ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: We will make you recite, [O Muhammad], and you will not forget,
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: We will have you recite ˹the Quran, O Prophet,˺ so you will not forget ˹any of it˺,

ayahs.textArabic: إِلَّا مَا شَآءَ ٱللَّهُۚ إِنَّهُۥ يَعۡلَمُ ٱلۡجَهۡرَ وَمَا يَخۡفَىٰ
ayahs.textTransliteration: Illa ma shaa Allahu innahu yaAAlamu aljahra wama yakhfa
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: Except what Allah should will. Indeed, He knows what is declared and what is hidden.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: unless Allah wills otherwise. He surely knows what is open and what is hidden.

ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: And We will ease you toward ease.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: We will facilitate for you the Way of Ease.

ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: So remind, if the reminder should benefit;
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: So ˹always˺ remind ˹with the Quran˺—˹even˺ if the reminder is beneficial ˹only to some˺.

ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: He who fears [Allah] will be reminded.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: Those in awe ˹of Allah˺ will be mindful ˹of it˺.

ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: But the wretched one will avoid it -
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: But it will be shunned by the most wretched,

ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: [He] who will [enter and] burn in the greatest Fire,
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: who will burn in the greatest Fire,

ayahs.textArabic: ثُمَّ لَا يَمُوتُ فِيهَا وَلَا يَحۡيَىٰ
ayahs.textTransliteration: Thumma la yamootu feeha wala yahya
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: where they will not ˹be able to˺ live or die.

ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: He has certainly succeeded who purifies himself
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: Successful indeed are those who purify themselves,

ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: And mentions the name of his Lord and prays.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: remember the Name of their Lord, and pray.

ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: But you prefer the worldly life,
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: But you ˹deniers only˺ prefer the life of this world,

ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: While the Hereafter is better and more enduring.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: even though the Hereafter is far better and more lasting.

ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: Indeed, this is in the former scriptures,
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: This is certainly ˹mentioned˺ in the earlier Scriptures—

ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: The scriptures of Abraham and Moses.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: the Scriptures of Abraham and Moses.
